# AltorLab — AI Tools

> AltorLab offers AI-powered tools for US consumers. AI Room Redesign transforms room photos into stunning redesigns for $9. Background removal and tattoo design coming soon.

## Tools
- [AI Room Redesign](https://app.altorlab.org/room-redesign): Upload photo, choose style, get redesign ($9)
- [Background Remover](https://app.altorlab.org/tools/background-remover): Remove backgrounds instantly (coming soon)
- [Tattoo Designer](https://app.altorlab.org/tools/tattoo-designer): Generate tattoo designs (coming soon)

## Design Styles
- [Modern](https://app.altorlab.org/styles/modern)
- [Scandinavian](https://app.altorlab.org/styles/scandinavian)
- [Minimalist](https://app.altorlab.org/styles/minimalist)
- [Industrial](https://app.altorlab.org/styles/industrial)
- [Bohemian](https://app.altorlab.org/styles/bohemian)

## Pricing
- AI Room Redesign: $9 per design
- Background Remover: Free
- Tattoo Designer: Free
